name: pict-provider-keybindings-example-kanban-shortcuts
description: Kanban Shortcuts - per-view binding lifecycle, route shortcuts, and scopes across a routed multi-view app

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Kanban Shortcuts
ExampleApplication.Summary: A routed multi-view app showing per-view binding lifecycle (shortcuts auto-evict when you navigate away), Route shortcuts (g b / g l) that drive pict-router, and a view-local scope. The live cheatsheet changes as you move between views.
